testcase.name: test_remove_card_from_binder

failure.message: AssertionError: assert '69c97ff0d37774e4a9de10a3' is None + where '69c97ff0d37774e4a9de10a3' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff52fa82df00>('binder_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff52fa82df00> = {'_id': '69c9657642aae8b6fbdcf82f', 'binder_id': '69c97ff0d37774e4a9de10a3', 'card_name': 'Trevenant', 'card_number': '12', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_card_detail_features.py:131: in test_remove_card_from_binder assert updated_card.get("binder_id") is None E AssertionError: assert '69c97ff0d37774e4a9de10a3' is None E + where '69c97ff0d37774e4a9de10a3' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff52fa82df00>('binder_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff52fa82df00> = {'_id': '69c9657642aae8b6fbdcf82f', 'binder_id': '69c97ff0d37774e4a9de10a3', 'card_name': 'Trevenant', 'card_number': '12', ...}.get
